visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic title card featuring the Costco Wholesale logo and an animated character resembling Wreck-It Ralph on the left. The scene is set in a large, brightly lit warehouse with high ceilings and industrial lighting visible above. The text in the center announces weekly special price reports for the dates 09/29 to 10/05. (2) A rapid series of cuts follows, showcasing various products on warehouse shelves. First, cases of Coca-Cola bottles are shown stacked on wooden pallets under bright overhead lights. The camera is static, focusing on the red labels and black liquid of the bottles. (3) The scene shifts to the meat section, displaying trays of marbled beef strips wrapped in clear plastic, followed by packs of pork belly. The lighting is cold and even, typical of a refrigerated display case. (4) Further cuts show frozen seafood including squid skewers and red shrimp, followed by packaged abalone and mackerel fillets. Each shot is a close-up or medium shot of the items on display shelves. (5) The video transitions to non-food items, including racks of blue jeans being touched by a hand, various outdoor grills (black and silver metal), and stacks of chocolate boxes. (6) Later segments display household goods like lamps, cleaning sprays, tea boxes, and toiletries like shampoo and toothpaste. Each product is centered in the frame with clear price overlays. The warehouse environment remains consistent, with industrial shelving and bulk packaging visible in the backgrounds.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One hand visible flipping through clothes; one woman visible in the background profile during the tea section.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: No main human character is featured; focus is on products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high open-joist ceilings, industrial rack shelving, bulk cardboard packaging, and refrigerated display cases.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track featuring a steady four-on-the-floor beat and bright synthesizers. A male narrator immediately delivers an energetic introduction in Mandarin at a very high speech rate, setting an urgent and exciting tone for a sales report. (2) As the visuals cut rapidly between items, the narrator maintains a relentless pace, listing each product's name and its discounted price. His voice exhibits high pitch variability and strong projection, matching the rhythmic energy of the background music. Subtle electronic whoosh sound effects emphasize the quick transitions between segments. (3) Throughout the entire duration, there are no significant pauses in speech. The audio maintains a consistent high-arousal level with the music remaining at a steady volume in the background, clearly audible but below the narrator's voice level. The spectral balance is bright and sharp, emphasizing the clarity of the rapid narration.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a rapid-fire promotional advertisement to inform shoppers about the current week's specific discounts and special offers at Costco Taiwan. By using a fast-paced montage and high-energy narration, it aims to create a sense of urgency and variety, encouraging viewers to visit the store during the limited sale period.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the Costco logo, product names, original prices, and special sale prices with clear duration dates.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a typical social-media style shopping guide characterized by extremely fast editing and narration to maximize information density in a short duration.
